title: Lifting of Order of Documentary Processing Suspension. Upon
content: 1 request, the Order of Documentary Suspension shall be lifted by the Undersecretary for 2 Foreign Employment and Welfare Services only when there is proof of compliance by the 3 LMA and/or principal/employer with the directive issued by concerned Bureau 4 Director/Regional Director and upon the latter’s recommendation. 5 6 Notwithstanding the above provision, the Department may allow the processing of 7 seafarers for emergency purposes, in compliance with applicable international treaties 8 and/or conventions. 9 10

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
